calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Spencer Chen for (petitioner) Stefan Auer. Victoria Tran Sood for Tatiana Zimmer.

The Court stated that documents had been filed on Friday and asked if there was anything else to consider. Ms. Tran Sood stated that the petition was filed for the execution of terms of the settlement agreement, that they need a court order to file with the recorders office, that there is no objection to this, that they need an order for the settlement agreement and an order for severance of joint tenancy. The Court granted the petition for order approving settlement agreement (subject to review of the order). The Petition for Order Setting Aside Severance of Joint Tenancy, etc., was taken under submission. The Petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos & Deputy Neves. (Not Reported)
